findings.issue: Mandatory PK files missing: project.md and architecture.md are not listed in Context Files. Task-creator rules require these always be present.
findings.fix: Add project.md and architecture.md links to Context Files section. Use discovered PK paths (e.g., [project.md](../../../.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/project.md)).

findings.issue: Broken relative paths: all links using '../../skills/' resolve to 'work/skills/' which does not exist. Task files are at work/design-pipeline/tasks/, so reaching repo root requires '../../../'. Affected links: skill-master/SKILL.md, retrospective/SKILL.md, procedural-skills.md.
findings.fix: Change all '../../skills/' to '../../../skills/' in Context Files and Required Skills sections.

findings.issue: Mandatory PK files missing: project.md and architecture.md are not listed in Context Files.
findings.fix: Add project.md and architecture.md links to Context Files section.

findings.issue: Broken relative paths: all links using '../../skills/' resolve to 'work/skills/' which does not exist. Affected links: skill-master/SKILL.md, do-task/SKILL.md, design-review/SKILL.md.
findings.fix: Change all '../../skills/' to '../../../skills/' in Context Files and Required Skills sections.

findings.issue: Mandatory PK files missing: project.md and architecture.md are not listed in Context Files.
findings.fix: Add project.md and architecture.md links to Context Files section.

findings.issue: Mandatory PK files missing: project.md and architecture.md are not listed in Context Files.
findings.fix: Add project.md and architecture.md links to Context Files section.

findings.issue: Broken relative paths: all links using '../../skills/' resolve to 'work/skills/' which does not exist. Affected links: security-auditor/SKILL.md, design-system-init/SKILL.md, design-generate/SKILL.md, design-review/SKILL.md, design-retrospective/SKILL.md, do-task/SKILL.md, preview-template.html.
findings.fix: Change all '../../skills/' to '../../../skills/' in Context Files and Required Skills sections.

findings.issue: Skill path uses incorrect relative path: '../../../skills/code-reviewing/SKILL.md'. Need to verify that 'code-reviewing' skill directory actually exists at that path. The skill name 'code-reviewing' in frontmatter must match an actual skill directory.
findings.fix: Verify the skill directory name. If the skill is named 'code-reviewer' (not 'code-reviewing'), update both frontmatter skills field and Required Skills section.

findings.issue: Verification Steps section has only one subsection (Automated with skill-checker). No Smoke subsection despite tech-spec not listing Verify-smoke for Task 6. However, the section is thin — only a single subagent spawn. No concrete verification commands.
findings.fix: Add concrete verification: check SKILL.md exists, check line count < 500, check frontmatter contains required fields. These are executable checks the agent can run.

findings.issue: Verification Steps has only Smoke subsection but no Automated subsection. Template requires Automated subsection for all tasks (even if N/A).
findings.fix: Add '### Automated' subsection stating 'Not applicable — task modifies markdown, no tests to run.' to make section structure explicit.

findings.issue: PK file paths point to 'shared/templates/new-project/.agents/skills/project-knowledge/references/' which is a template directory, not the actual project knowledge. These paths may not contain project-specific content.
findings.fix: Use actual discovered PK paths from the repo's .claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/ directory, or verify that the template paths are the correct canonical location.

findings.issue: Reviewers section text says 'No reviewers' but does not follow template format. Template expects a structured section even when empty, matching frontmatter reviewers: [].
findings.fix: Standardize to: 'No reviewers — audit task produces its own review report.' This matches the pattern but is acceptable. Current wording is fine functionally.

findings.issue: Reviewers section text says 'Нет ревьюеров' but does not follow template format with bullet list.
findings.fix: Acceptable for audit tasks with empty reviewers. No change needed but flag for consistency.

findings.issue: Template placeholder '{round}' remains in reviewer report path: 'skill-checker-{round}.json'. Checklist flags {round} as a template placeholder.
findings.fix: Replace {round} with '1' for initial round, or document that {round} is intentionally a runtime variable pattern.

findings.issue: Template placeholder '{round}' remains in reviewer report path: 'skill-checker-{round}.json'.
findings.fix: Replace {round} with '1' for initial round, or document as runtime variable.

findings.issue: Template placeholder '{round}' remains in reviewer report paths for code-reviewer, security-auditor, test-reviewer.
findings.fix: Replace {round} with '1' for initial round, or document as runtime variable.

findings.issue: Code file listed as plain text 'skills/design-retrospective/SKILL.md (new — create)' instead of markdown link format.
findings.fix: Convert to markdown link: [design-retrospective/SKILL.md](../../../skills/design-retrospective/SKILL.md) (new — create)

findings.issue: Code file to delete listed as plain text 'skills/like-figma/ (entire directory)' instead of markdown link.
findings.fix: Convert to markdown link format.

findings.issue: Task modifies only 1 file (do-task/SKILL.md) with ~5 lines. Very small scope. Could potentially be merged with Task 8 (also Wave 3). However, they have different skills (skill-master vs code-writing) and different reviewers, so separation is justified.
findings.fix: No action needed — different skill requirements justify separation.

findings.issue: Post-completion checklist item differs from template: 'ключевые findings' instead of standard 'ревью со ссылками на JSON'. Minor wording deviation.
findings.fix: Align with template: '- [ ] Записать краткий отчёт в decisions.md по шаблону (Summary: 1-3 предложения, ревью со ссылками на JSON, без таблиц файндингов и дампов)'

findings.issue: Post-completion checklist deviates from template: mentions 'ключевые findings', 'Critical/High findings' instead of standard template items. Different wording from template.
findings.fix: Align with template post-completion checklist while keeping the audit-specific additions.

findings.issue: Verification Steps Automated subsection only checks file existence of the report. No concrete automated verification of audit quality.
findings.fix: Acceptable for audit tasks — the audit report is the deliverable. File existence is sufficient automated verification.
